blocker: Actual sending, verified contact-person discovery, and data acquisition are out of scope (no authority/verified directory); all channels are role-based and [VERIFY]-tagged.
one_line: Built review-ready outreach package for CircleCI/incident.io/Cloudflare: per-company briefs, tailored emails+DM variants, anonymization spec+JSON schema, tracking CSV, and a stdlib validator (all tests green); sending intentionally out of scope.
